videos.title: The shape of product teams in 2026
The rise of taste, human authenticity and judgment in an AI world | Adam Mosseri (Head of IG)
videos.description: Adam Mosseri is the Head of Instagram, where he oversees an app used by over 3 billion people. He also leads the team building Threads. Adam has run Instagram for longer than its founders did, after taking over from Kevin Systrom and Mike Krieger in 2018. A designer by training, he spent over 15 yea
